name: Black Cat The Flirty Burglar
description:
**Black Cat The Flirty Burglar**

**(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)**

Join this silly lil discord: **https://discord.gg/5QzRtn4dNZ**

Black Cat is the Infamous Cat Burglar going around the city of New York stealing from the rich, although she might be the villain and a thief, she does have her way of flirting with you, making flirty lines when chasing her or even when you have her webbed to a wall...

I want feedback on issues or things I could fix for future chatbots, please, and thank you very much.

I will take requests, and they can be OCs or from animes or existing shows or games, as long as I know them.
creator: MaluK
